objective: Expose the named Option type from the missing ui/option.js ambient module so PermissionRuleList can keep its existing type-only import without changing runtime behavior.
changes: Added a named Option type export to the */ui/option.js ambient module.
Aliased Option to the existing CustomSelect OptionWithDescription<string> shape instead of using a broad any type.

verification.notes: The PermissionRuleList TS2614 diagnostic for Option no longer appears in the tsc log.

next_candidates: Add isReplBridgeActive to src/bootstrap/state.ts for SendMessageTool and ToolSearchTool prompt imports.
Add BetaTool compatibility to the Anthropic SDK beta messages boundary.
Add targeted internal-only module declarations for protectedNamespace, attributionTrailer, TerminalCaptureTool prompt, VerifyPlanExecutionTool constants, peerSessions, and workerAgent.
